briefdescription.para: This function reads the array I2stx_SrcBuf which has the values of all the I2S Transmitter AES status registers, extracts the required bits and prints them.

detaileddescription.para: Before calling this API, Call API XI2s_Tx_GetAesChStatus.

parameterdescription.para: is an array that contains the values of all the the AES Status registers.
